headline: Accenture (ACN) Makes A Quiet Move Into One Of The Most Important Markets Ahead
summary: Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) is among the 11 Undervalued Quantum Computing Stocks to Invest In. On April 14, Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) was selected to lead a high-velocity engineering and integration sprint for the U.S. Department of Energy’s Genesis Mission, a project aimed at strengthening critical mineral supply chains in the United States. The initiative focuses on the […]
